descriptions: Collect samples so our researchers can keep inventing things that explode harder, better, and more democratically.
Science requires fresh specimens, and democracy requires science to produce bigger booms.
The research division requests additional alien matter for study, disposal, and commemorative desk ornaments.
Every meter walked is another stomp on the face of tyranny.
Patriotic conditioning reminds you that cardio is the foundation of conquest.
A Helldiver in motion is a recruitment poster with legs. Keep moving.

displayName: Extract with at least X% time remaining
descriptions: Efficiency is the bedrock of democracy. Finish early so you can liberate even more tomorrow!
The sooner you finish, the sooner the Ministry can spend you somewhere else.
Extraction ahead of schedule proves discipline, competence, and proper fear of L-08 overtime forms.
Hold the line, and let freedom come to you. Remember: Movement is for cowards and xenos scum.
The Ministry has determined unnecessary walking is indistinguishable from wandering.
Stand your ground. Super Earth paid for this position and expects full use of it.
Stack bodies high for liberty! The more corpses you leave behind, the closer we get to peace.
Peace is achieved one overwhelming casualty report at a time.
Your orders are to persuade the enemy to reconsider existing by the end of this mission.

displayName: Secure at least X melee kills
descriptions: Show the enemy that Super Earth's handshake comes with a closed fist.
A personal touch reminds the foe that democracy cares enough to get close.
Budget constraints have reclassified blunt trauma as premium patriotism.

displayName: Achieve at least X% weapon accuracy
descriptions: Precision is the difference between a hero and a court-martial.
Every missed shot is an invoice to taxpayers and an apology to the enemy.
The taxpayer prefers your bullets meet hostiles, not scenery.

displayName: Call in at least X stratagems
descriptions: The skies are ours, Helldiver. Rain down freedom like it's a thunderstorm of democracy.
Orbital assets exist to be used, admired, and blamed on weather patterns.
Fleet doctrine demands constant airspace activity so the enemy never mistakes this for mercy.
If it moves, shoot it. If it doesn't move, shoot it anyway just to be sure.
A silent rifle invites fear, and fear is the mind-killer.
Ammunition is cheaper than hesitation and dramatically louder.
Try not to die. Dying is unpatriotic, and basic training isn't cheap.
Approved C-01 permit counts have exceeded this quarter's acceptable budget.
Your contribution is requested to remain technically alive for the duration.
Super Earth invested in your training. Make it a profitable return.
Your casualty ratio is being monitored by auditors with very sharp pencils.
Every death on our side is expected to purchase several on theirs.
Pain is weakness leaving the body. Or entering it. Either way, walk it off, Helldiver.
Medical supplies are for emergencies, not for every little puncture, burn, or missing limb.
Certain administrators suspect some Helldivers are enjoying stims recreationally. Prove them wrong.

displayName: Be responsible for at most X accidentals
descriptions: Friendly fire isn't actually friendly!
Your squadmates are state property. Please stop depreciating taxpayer assets.
The enemy should remain the leading cause of casualties.
This is a targeted operation, not a buffet. Control your enthusiasm.
The mission assigned objectives, not a personal crusade against local wildlife.
Conserve your murderous spirit for targets that actually matter.

displayName: Call in at most X stratagems
descriptions: Minimal fire support requested. Someone is testing something. Don't ask.
The Super Admiralty is conducting a thrilling study on whether restraint can be weaponized.
Excessive stratagem usage has been temporarily classified as emotional dependence.
High Command is reviewing fleet ammo expenses. Again.
This operation is sponsored by the Ministry of Fiscal Discipline.
Every bullet must now justify itself before leaving the barrel.

displayName: Allow enemy reinforcements at most X times
descriptions: If we wanted a full-on war, we'd throw a thousand SEAF troopers at the problem.
Keep enemy reinforcements low. We are trying to win efficiently, not theatrically.
The Ministry prefers a tidy extermination over a prolonged public spectacle.
